ticket_title: Metro API Error Blocking Protection Plan Offers During Activation

test_cases.name: TC-1: Representative successfully reaches protection plan selection with a dealer-stocked device [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: New-subscriber activation in progress; dealer-stocked device scanned and confirmed; customer has passed identity check | Test Data: New prepaid customer, dealer-stocked handset, COR store, identity check passed, valid state and ZIP code

steps.action: Representative completes the device scan and SIM setup steps in the activation flow
Representative proceeds to the protection plan selection step
System sends device information to the carrier to retrieve available protection plan offers
Representative views the list of plans displayed on screen
steps.expected: Protection plan offers load successfully. Representative can select a plan or choose to skip. No error message appears.

test_cases.name: TC-2: Protection plan offers load correctly for a customer bringing their own device [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: New-subscriber activation with a customer's own device; identity check passed | Test Data: New prepaid customer, bring-your-own handset, COR store, identity check passed

steps.action: Representative confirms the customer's own device and completes the SIM step
Representative proceeds to the protection plan selection step
System retrieves available plans for the customer's device
steps.expected: Protection plan offers appropriate for the device type load successfully. No error is shown.

test_cases.name: TC-3: Activation completes end-to-end including protection plan selection with dealer stock [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: New-subscriber activation in progress, dealer-stocked device, all prior steps completed | Test Data: New prepaid customer, dealer-stocked handset, protection plan selected, COR store

steps.action: Representative completes all activation steps up to protection plan selection
Representative selects a protection plan from the list
Representative proceeds through payment and submits the activation
steps.expected: Activation completes successfully. Customer receives confirmation and service is active. No carrier errors appear at any step.

test_cases.name: TC-4: Regression — existing-account and new-account activations with dealer stock are unaffected [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Standard activations for both new and existing accounts using dealer-stocked devices | Test Data: New prepaid customer with dealer-stocked handset; and separately, existing-account activation with dealer-stocked handset, COR store

steps.action: Representative performs a new-subscriber activation with a dealer-stocked device through the protection plan step
Representative performs an existing-account activation with a dealer-stocked device through the protection plan step
steps.expected: Both activation types complete without errors. Protection plan offers load correctly in both scenarios.

test_cases.name: TC-5: Device upgrade — protection plan offers load for a dealer-stocked upgrade device [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Existing subscriber upgrading to a new device; dealer-stocked device selected | Test Data: Existing prepaid account, device upgrade, dealer-stocked handset, COR store

steps.action: Representative initiates an upgrade activation for the customer
Representative completes device and SIM steps
Representative proceeds to the protection plan selection step
steps.expected: Protection plan offers load successfully. Representative can select or skip. No carrier API errors.
